CustomField.formula:
IF(Type_of_Comment__c =='Direct', IF(CreatedById== Community_Feed__r.CreatedById, False,True ) , IF(Type_of_Comment__c =='Indirect', IF( (CreatedById==Community_Feed__r.Community_Feed_Parent__r.CreatedById ) && Community_Feed__r.Send_Email__c ==True, False,
IF((CreatedById<>Community_Feed__r.Community_Feed_Parent__r.CreatedById ) && Community_Feed__r.Send_Email__c ==False ,True,
IF( (CreatedById<>Community_Feed__r.Community_Feed_Parent__r.CreatedById ) && Community_Feed__r.Send_Email__c ==True,True,False
))),False))
CustomField.label: Send Email
